title: February 29
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 29''' is the 60th day of a leap year. This day only occurs once every four years. There are 306 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Harvey Jason]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Christopher Perkins]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 37|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 37]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace'' paperback]] published.<noinclude>
